title: Command Cockpit Mounted Stage Expansion
summary: Expanded the Command Cockpit mounted lane stage so reclaimed chrome space becomes usable playable viewport.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that raises the mounted stage max-height after rail, HUD, and lens compression.
Trimmed mounted-stage padding and bottom fade only in the Cockpit stage so more selected-lane content appears before internal scrolling.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the mounted-stage expansion unlock.
